title: Vanilla Laser
description: Create vanilla styled laser in server side
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZIspDiX6/images/0ec6c64627146116f77f16a7d90c10b9ca5d749f.png)
# Vanilla Laser
Create vanilla styled laser in server side.

* Add server-side entity "laser:shooter".
* It can be created via command `/summon laser:shooter {TargetPosition:{x:0d,y:0d,z:0d}}` or `/laser create 0 0 0`

## Command

1. `/laser create <x> <y> <z>` create a laser target to x y z
2. `/laser create <selector>` create a laser target to specified entity
3. `/laser list` list loaded laser entity (you can click name to edit it)
